item.title: Iran: 6 US Troops Killed, Strait of Hormuz Threatened, Embassies Closed
item.description: U.S. Central Command confirmed 6 service members killed in action. Iran vowed to close the Strait of Hormuz — oil supertanker rates hit all-time highs. U.S. closed embassies in Saudi Arabia and Kuwait. Trump ordered Navy to escort tankers through the Strait and provide risk insurance for Gulf maritime trade. (Sources: CNBC)

item.title: NYC Mayor Mamdani: Parks Budget & Universal Child Care
item.description: Parks Department budget initiative announced focused on recreation programs. Universal Child Care expansion policy unveiled. (Sources: NY Times — limited detail due to bot detection on full articles)

item.title: AI/ML: GPT-5.3 Instant, Claude Code Voice, Qwen Lead Exits
item.description: OpenAI released GPT-5.3 Instant — tuned to reduce dismissive responses. Claude Code launched voice mode capability. Alibaba's Qwen tech lead stepped down following the company's major AI push. (Sources: TechCrunch)

item.title: Fintech: Stripe AI Service, PayPay IPO Stalled, Plaid at $8B
item.description: Stripe launching a new service to convert AI compute costs into a profit center. SoftBank-backed PayPay IPO stalled due to geopolitical instability. Plaid valued at $8B in employee share sale. No Moody's-specific credit rating changes. (Sources: TechCrunch)

item.title: 🔴 Iran Escalation: Largest US Base Hit by Ballistic Missile, 6 Troops Killed
item.description: Al Udeid Air Base in Qatar struck by ballistic missile. Six US troops killed in separate drone strike on Kuwait command center. US embassies under direct attack as Iran retaliates for US-Israeli strikes that killed Ayatollah Khamenei. Conflict widening into Gulf state host nations.
